title: Mock Test 35 - Conditional 3 (If + had + V3, would have + V3)
description: এই টেস্টে Conditional Sentence Type 3 (Past Unreal Conditional) নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন রয়েছে। প্রথম কয়েকটি প্রশ্নে জানবো নিয়ম ও গঠন, তারপর fill in the blanks, error detection ও অনুবাদ দিয়ে উদাহরণ সহ শেখা। প্রতিটি প্রশ্নের বাংলা অর্থ ও বিস্তারিত ব্যাখ্যা দেওয়া আছে।

questions.question: Conditional Type 3 (Past Unreal Conditional)-এর গঠন কী?
options: If + Past Perfect, would have + V3
questions.explanation: Type 3 (Past Unreal): If + Past Perfect (had + V3), would have + V3। যেমন: If I had studied, I would have passed. (পড়িনি, তাই পাস করিনি — অতীতের অসম্ভব)

questions.question: Conditional Type 3 কী বোঝায়?
questions.explanation: Type 3 = past unreal condition। অতীতে যা ঘটেনি বা সম্ভব ছিল না সেটার কল্পনা। যেমন: If I had woken up early, I would have caught the bus. (ঘুম থেকে উঠিনি, তাই bus ধরিনি)

questions.question: Conditional Type 3-এর 'would have' এর পরে verb-এর কী রূপ হয়?
questions.explanation: 'would have' এর পরে সবসময় V3 (past participle) হয়। যেমন: would have gone, would have eaten, would have seen।

questions.question: If-clause-এ Conditional Type 3-এ কোন tense ব্যবহার হয়?
questions.explanation: Type 3-এর if-clause-এ Past Perfect (had + V3) ব্যবহৃত হয়। যেমন: If I had known, If she had come, If we had seen।

questions.question: 'If I had studied medicine, I ___ a doctor.' — বাক্যটি কোন ধরনের Conditional?
questions.explanation: 'If I had studied' = Past Perfect, তাই Type 3 (Past Unreal)। অতীতে studied করিনি, তাই doctor হতে পারিনি।

questions.question: If I had known your number, I ___ you. (যদি তোমার নাম্বার জানতাম, তাহলে কল করতাম)
questions.explanation: Type 3: If + had + V3 → would have + V3। 'If I had known your number, I would have called you.'

questions.question: If she ___ earlier, she would have caught the train. (সে যদি আগে আসত, ট্রেন ধরতে পারত)
questions.explanation: Type 3: If-clause-এ Past Perfect (had + come)। 'If she had come earlier, she would have caught the train.'

questions.question: If we ___ the map, we wouldn't have gotten lost. (যদি আমরা ম্যাপ নিতাম, তাহলে হারাতাম না)
questions.explanation: Type 3: If + had taken। 'If we had taken the map, we wouldn't have gotten lost.' (ম্যাপ নেইনি, তাই হারিয়েছি)

questions.question: If he had driven carefully, the accident ___ . (সে যদি সাবধানে গাড়ি চালাত, তাহলে দুর্ঘটনা ঘটত না)
questions.explanation: Type 3: would not + have + V3 (happened)। 'If he had driven carefully, the accident would not have happened.'

questions.question: If I had saved money, I ___ a new phone. (যদি টাকা জমাতাম, নতুন ফোন কিনতাম)
questions.explanation: Type 3: would have + V3 (bought)। 'If I had saved money, I would have bought a new phone.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'If I had knew, I would have come.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'Had' এর পরে V3 (known) হবে, knew (V2) নয়। সঠিক: 'If I had known, I would have come.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'If I would have seen him, I would have told him.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
options: If I would have seen him
questions.explanation: If-clause-এ 'would have' ব্যবহার হয় না। 'If I had seen him' হবে। সঠিক: 'If I had seen him, I would have told him.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'If she had studied, she would passed the exam.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'Would' এর পরে 'have + V3' লাগবে। 'She would passed' না হয়ে 'she would have passed' হবে। সঠিক: 'If she had studied, she would have passed the exam.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'If I had money, I would have bought the car.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: Conditional 3-এ if-clause-এ Past Perfect (had + V3) লাগে। 'If I had had money' হবে (had-এর V3 = had)। কিন্তু বক্তা Type 2 বোঝাতে চাইলে 'If I had money, I would buy the car.' — সঠিক। এখানে Type 3 হলে 'If I had had money, I would have bought the car.' হবে।

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'If I ___ that she was sick, I would have visited her.' (যদি জানতাম সে অসুস্থ, তাহলে দেখতে যেতাম)
questions.explanation: Type 3: If + had known। 'If I had known that she was sick, I would have visited her.'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'If the weather ___ good, we would have gone to the beach.' (যদি আবহাওয়া ভালো থাকত, আমরা সৈকতে যেতাম)
questions.explanation: Type 3: If + had been। 'If the weather had been good, we would have gone to the beach.' (আবহাওয়া ভালো ছিল না)

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'They would have won the match if they ___ better.' (তারা ভালো খেললে ম্যাচ জিতত)
questions.explanation: Type 3: If + had played। 'They would have won the match if they had played better.'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'If I ___ the alarm, I wouldn't have been late.' (যদি অ্যালার্ম দিতাম, তাহলে দেরি হতো না)
questions.explanation: Type 3: If + had set। 'If I had set the alarm, I wouldn't have been late.'

questions.question: বাংলা বাক্যটির সঠিক ইংরেজি অনুবাদ কোনটি? 'যদি আমি আগে থেকে জানতাম, তাহলে আসতাম।'
options: If I know earlier, I will come.
If I knew earlier, I would come.
If I had known earlier, I would have come.
If I have known earlier, I would have come.
questions.explanation: অতীতে জানিনি, তাই আসিনি → Type 3: 'If I had known earlier, I would have come.'

questions.question: বাংলা বাক্যটির সঠিক ইংরেজি অনুবাদ কোনটি? 'সে যদি ট্যাক্সি নিত, তাহলে সময়মতো পৌঁছে যেত।'
options: If she takes a taxi, she will arrive on time.
If she took a taxi, she would arrive on time.
If she had taken a taxi, she would have arrived on time.
If she would take a taxi, she would arrive on time.
questions.explanation: অতীতে taxi নেয়নি, তাই সময়মতো পৌঁছায়নি → Type 3: 'If she had taken a taxi, she would have arrived on time.'
